reason: The diff clearly implements right-click and drag to pan the camera functionality through multiple coordinated changes: it adds a `rightClickPanning` option (defaulting to true), implements `getIsRightPointing()` and `setIsRightPointing()` in InputsManager, handles right-click pointer events in MenuClickCapture and useCanvasEvents to distinguish between static right-clicks (opening context menu) and right-click drags (panning), includes comprehensive e2e tests validating the panning behavior, and updates the Editor's pointer handling to transition from right-pointing to p
